tasks.prompt:
同步 ~/.claude/session-data/* 到 Filebrowser 用户家目录。执行命令：
```bash
SOURCE_DIR="$HOME/.claude/session-data"
TARGET_BASE="/root/vps/game/filebrowser-nginx1/data/users"
USERS=(sunny_panda_542 happy_deer_900 kind_lion_572 kind_wolf_489 calm_dolphin_194 clever_tiger_915 sunny_panda_236 cool_dolphin_175 clever_deer_889 clever_dolphin_194)

if [ -d "$SOURCE_DIR" ] && [ "$(ls -A "$SOURCE_DIR" 2>/dev/null)" ]; then
  for user in "${USERS[@]}"; do
    if [ -d "$TARGET_BASE/$user" ]; then
      rsync -av --delete "$SOURCE_DIR/" "$TARGET_BASE/$user/session-data/" 2>/dev/null
    fi
  done
fi
```
